actions.label: Read taskbar and display status
actions.script: Query taskbar auto-hide, current resolution, and current scale from daemon host API.

actions.label: Toggle taskbar auto-hide
actions.script: Toggle Windows taskbar auto-hide state and return updated status.

actions.label: Set taskbar auto-hide
actions.script: Apply taskbarAutoHide from settings and return updated status.

actions.label: Set display resolution
actions.script: Apply resolutionWidth, resolutionHeight, and refreshRate through daemon host API.

actions.label: Set display scale
actions.script: Apply scalePercent via daemon host API and return updated status.
